name: Hangzhou Youngsun Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Youngsun Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells packing machines in China and internationally. It offers vacuum packaging machines, case erectors, labeling machines, shrink wrappers, carton sealers, strapping tools and machines, palletizers, wrapping machines, carton packers, packing lines, PP/PET straps, stretch/shrink films, conveyors, filling and capping machines, cartoning machines, robots, and flow packs. The company is based in Hangzhou, China.
